hotels.description_en:
Beachfront Location: Boutique Beach House in La Manga del Mar Menor offers direct beachfront access with stunning sea views. Guests can relax by the swimming pool with a view, sun terrace, and lush garden.
Rooms feature air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and modern amenities. Additional facilities include a fitness room, outdoor fireplace, and free WiFi throughout the property.
The restaurant serves Greek, Mediterranean, Spanish, and international cuisines in a traditional, modern, and romantic ambience. Breakfast options include continental, vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free selections.
Playa Mistral is a 2-minute walk away, while Puerto Deportivo Tomas Maestre lies less than 1 km from the hotel. Region de Murcia International Airport is 65 km distant.
